features.name: No board drag from body
features.description: Boards can only be moved via the drag handle (top-left symbol). Clicking and dragging the board body should no longer move it. Test: select a board, then try dragging it from the center - it should stay put. Then drag using the move handle - it should move normally.

features.name: ctrl+s to save
features.description: Pressing ctrl+s (or cmd+s) downloads the current scene as a JSON file (optical-bench-state.json). The old localStorage save alert has been removed. Test: press ctrl+s and confirm a file download is triggered. Also confirm it does NOT fire when typing in an input field.

features.name: Cell beams from all directions
features.description: The Faraday cell now intercepts beams arriving from all 4 directions (not just horizontal). Test: place a laser pointing downward into a cell - polarization should rotate. Previously only horizontal beams were affected.

features.name: Custom component transparency
features.description: Custom components have an Opacity slider in the properties panel. The opacity applies ONLY to the fill color - the border stroke and text remain fully opaque at all opacity levels. Test: create a custom component with a fill color and border, drag the opacity slider to 0.3 - the fill should be semi-transparent but the border outline and any text should remain solid.

features.name: Group rotation around centroid
features.description: Selecting multiple components shows a dashed bounding box around all selected elements. The rotation handle is at the top-right corner. Dragging it rotates all elements together in 45-degree snaps. The bounding box itself rotates with the group - it keeps its original dimensions and rotates, rather than recomputing as an axis-aligned box. Test: select 2+ components, drag the rotation handle - the dashed box should rotate with the selection, not resize/realign.

features.name: Color picker with presets
features.description: Color picker rows (fill, border, text color on custom components) now show a row of 10 preset color swatches. Test: select a custom component, open properties - click any swatch to instantly apply that color.

features.name: x/y keyboard flip
features.description: Press x to flip a component left-right (mirror across Y axis). Press y to flip top-bottom (mirror across X axis). For D-mirrors, x toggles isFlipped. Test: select a laser, press x - it should now point the opposite horizontal direction. Press y - should flip vertically.

features.name: Beam glow rendering fix
features.description: Fix for colored laser beams showing as red/wrong color due to a malformed rgba string in the glow rendering. Test: place a laser, change its beam color to blue or green in the properties panel - the beam (including glow) should render in that color, not revert to red.

features.name: Vertical polarization as dots
features.description: Beams with vertical linear polarization (Stokes S1 < 0) are now drawn with dot glyphs instead of line glyphs. Horizontal polarization still shows as lines. Test: place a laser, add a half-waveplate rotated to convert to vertical polarization - the beam after the waveplate should show dots instead of lines along it.

features.name: Hebrew keyboard shortcuts
features.description: All single-letter keyboard shortcuts now work even when the system keyboard is set to Hebrew layout. Uses e.code (layout-independent physical key position) alongside e.key. Test: switch Windows keyboard to Hebrew, then use shortcuts like R (rotate), S (snap), X (flip), Y (flip), Delete - all should work the same as in English mode.

features.name: Twinleaf size controls
features.description: Rejected - unwanted feature.
features.reject_reason: Unwanted feature, delete it from the list

features.name: Paste custom component preserves size
features.description: Copy-pasting a custom component now preserves its original width and height. Previously, pasting always reset the size to the default 30x30. Test: create a custom component, resize it to something like 100x60, copy it (Ctrl+C), paste it (Ctrl+V) - the pasted copy should be 100x60, not 30x30.

features.name: Middle click pan while dragging
features.description: You can now pan the canvas with middle-click while in the middle of dragging a component. Previously, releasing the middle mouse button would cancel the component drag. Test: start dragging a component, then press and release the middle mouse button to pan - the component drag should continue after releasing middle button.

features.name: Measurement half-grid snapping
features.description: Measurement tool elements now snap to half-grid resolution (12.5mm) when dragging, giving finer placement control than the full 25mm grid. Test: place a measurement element and drag it - it should snap in smaller increments than other components, landing on 12.5mm intervals.

features.name: Copy board includes components
features.description: Copying a board now automatically includes all components placed on that board. Test: place several components on a board, select only the board, copy and paste - both the board and all its components should appear in the paste.

features.name: Future plan flag
features.description: Each component can be flagged as a 'future plan' via a checkbox in its properties panel. Flagged components appear at 30% opacity. A global 'Show Future Plans' checkbox in the toolbar hides/shows all faded components at once. Test: select a component, check 'Future Plan' - it should fade to 30% opacity. Uncheck the global toggle - it should disappear entirely.

features.name: ctrl+s localStorage save
features.description: ctrl+s now saves silently to localStorage (no alert, shows a brief toast notification). ctrl+shift+s exports a JSON file download. Test: press ctrl+s - should save silently with a small toast message appearing briefly. Press ctrl+shift+s - should trigger a file download.

features.name: Measurement text always readable
features.description: Measurement element labels now always face up or to the left - never upside-down. When the element is rotated between 90 and 270 degrees, the label is counter-rotated 180 degrees and positioned above the line from the reader's perspective. Test: place a measurement, rotate it to point downward or to the right - the label should flip to remain readable.

features.name: Drag board from body when selected
features.description: When a board is already selected, you can drag it from anywhere on its body (not just the move handle). When the board is NOT selected, clicking its body still starts a marquee selection. Also covers group drag: when a board is selected as part of a multi-element group, dragging any element moves the board and its children too. Test: click a board to select it, then drag from its center - it should move. Drag it again without selecting first - it should start a marquee instead.

features.name: Twinleaf optical opening dots
features.description: The twinleaf component now shows small dark circles at the center of each of its 4 edges, representing optical fiber input/output ports. Test: place a twinleaf - you should see 4 small dark circles with blue-grey stroke, one on each edge (top, right, bottom, left).

features.name: Double-click board body to rename
features.description: Double-clicking anywhere on a board body now opens the rename prompt, not just the narrow title strip above the board. Test: double-click anywhere inside a board rectangle - a prompt should appear to rename it.

features.name: Fix oversized hit area for large elements
features.description: Hit testing for element clicks now uses a proper rotated-rectangle test instead of a circular radius. Previously, large elements like twinleaf (245x325mm) had a hit radius of ~216mm, making nearby components impossible to click. Test: place a twinleaf and a small mirror nearby - you should be able to click the mirror without the twinleaf capturing the click.

features.name: Board resize from all corners + jump fix
features.description: Boards can now be resized by dragging any of the 4 corner handles (not just bottom-right). All 4 corners show small gray squares; the active one turns red. Also fixes a jump bug where the board would snap to a wrong size on the first move because the fixed corner was being re-snapped. Test: select a board, drag the top-left corner - the board should resize from that corner without jumping. Try all 4 corners.

features.name: Custom components snap to half-grid
features.description: Custom components (type 'custom') now snap to half-grid (12.5mm) by default when dragging, giving finer placement control than the full 25mm grid. Shift still gives free movement, Ctrl still gives explicit half-grid snap. All other component types are unaffected. Test: drag a custom component - it should snap at 12.5mm intervals. Drag a laser - it should still snap at 25mm (offset) intervals.

features.name: Mixed polarization shows angled line
features.description: Beams with mixed horizontal+vertical linear polarization (e.g., 45-degree linear, or any beam where S1 is between -90% and +90% of S0) now show an angled line glyph instead of dots. Dots are reserved for near-pure vertical polarization (S1 < -90% of S0). Test: place a laser (horizontal pol), add an HWP at 22.5 degrees - the output beam should show a diagonal line at 45 degrees. Add another HWP to rotate to pure vertical - the beam should then show dots.

features.name: Laser name input in sidebar
features.description: A Name text input is now shown at the top of the laser properties sidebar panel, allowing you to give each laser a meaningful name. This name is shown in filter/blocker panels when selecting which lasers to block, instead of generic 'Laser 1', 'Laser 2' labels. Test: select a laser, type 'Signal' in the Name field. Open a filter's properties - the laser should appear as 'Signal' in the block list.

features.name: Move to back
features.description: A 'Move to Back' button in the properties panel sends the selected element just behind other components but always in front of boards. The button works immediately without needing to deselect first - the panel stays open and the element stays selected. Test: place two overlapping components, select the top one, click 'Move to Back' - it should immediately go behind the other, and the properties panel should remain open.

features.name: Custom component preset colors update
features.description: The color swatches shown when editing custom component fill/border/text colors now use theme-appropriate colors matching the optical lab UI. New presets include dark navy/slate backgrounds, plus the colors used by built-in components (green=HWP, orange=QWP, purple=PBS, sky blue=fiber, amber=UI highlights). Test: select a custom component and open properties - the 10 swatches should look cohesive with the dark UI, not garish.

features.name: Fiber auto-rotate + mirror back-face snap fix
features.description: Two S-key auto-align improvements: (1) Fiber couplers now auto-rotate when pressing S to align their arrow with the incoming beam direction. (2) Mirror S-key cycling no longer offers the back-facing orientation - only angles that face the beam toward the reflective surface are shown. Test: place a fiber coupler near a beam at 45 degrees, press S - it should rotate to 45 degrees. Place a mirror, press S - cycling should never point the mirror backward.

features.name: Fix ray propagation drops laserId and thickness
features.description: Fixes two bugs with the same root cause: beam laserId and thickness properties were lost when a ray passed through AOM, lens, fiber-coupler, amplifier, or iris, because those branches constructed new ray objects explicitly without spreading the original ray properties. (1) Filter bug: filters now correctly block beams even when the beam passed through other components first. (2) Beam thickness bug: the beam thickness setting on a laser now visually applies to the full beam path. Test: set a laser beam thickness to 5, pass it through a lens - the beam after the lens should still be thick. Place a filter blocking that laser, pass beam through an AOM first - the filter should correctly block it.

features.name: ctrl+drag to duplicate
features.description: Holding Ctrl while starting to drag a single selected component creates a duplicate in place and drags the duplicate, leaving the original where it was. The clone integrates cleanly into the normal drag flow. Test: select one component, hold Ctrl and drag it - a copy should appear at the original position and move with the mouse. Release to place. Regular drag without Ctrl should be unaffected.

features.name: Fix modifier keys getting stuck
features.description: Shift and Ctrl modifier key state is now reset when the browser window loses focus (alt-tab, switching windows, switching tabs). Previously these could get stuck in the pressed state if the user alt-tabbed while holding them. Test: hold Shift, alt-tab away and back, release Shift while away - the app should no longer behave as if Shift is held.

features.name: Fix custom component opacity not saved
features.description: Two bugs fixed: (1) Saving a custom component to the library now includes its opacity, so loading from library preserves the opacity value. (2) Loading a saved scene (ctrl+s / import) or using undo/redo now correctly restores the opacity of custom components instead of resetting to 100%. Test: create a custom component, set opacity to 40%, save to library. Reload and place from library - opacity should be 40%. Also test ctrl+s then ctrl+z then ctrl+shift+s - opacity should persist across save/load.

features.name: Custom component border auto-darken
features.description: Custom component border improvements: (1) Changing the fill color automatically darkens the fill to set the border color (multiply RGB by 0.65). (2) A 'No border' checkbox removes the border entirely. (3) Border color changes are independent and don't affect fill. Test: create a custom component, change fill to red - border should auto-update to dark red. Check 'No border' - border should disappear.
features.fix_notes: the border should be a little thicker

features.name: Hide keyboard hint when measurement selected
features.description: The 'R/T: Rotation | S: Smart' keyboard hint box is no longer shown when a measurement element is selected, since those shortcuts don't apply to measurements. Test: place a measurement and select it - no hint box should appear above it. Select a mirror or laser - hint box should still appear.
features.fix_notes: also, dont automatically select the measurement tool after adding it. it should be unselected

features.name: Laser auto-color from palette
features.description: Each new laser placed on the canvas automatically gets a unique color from a preset palette. Colors are assigned by scanning existing laser colors and picking the first unused preset. Test: place 3+ lasers - each should have a different beam color. Undo a laser placement and re-place - the re-placed laser should get the same color as before (not drift to the next color).
